evals.prompt: Architecture documentation for inherited FastAPI codebase

with_skill.notes: Comprehensive documentation with Mermaid diagrams, deep coupling analysis, failure modes, onboarding guide, and architectural checklists. Includes C4 diagrams, multiple sequence diagrams, ERD, deployment architecture.

without_skill.notes: Complete architectural documentation with text-based diagrams, detailed flows, data model mapping, design patterns, integrations, and deployment considerations. Thorough but lacks Mermaid visualizations and advanced architectural analysis.

evals.prompt: Onboarding documentation for new engineers joining the team

with_skill.notes: Comprehensive onboarding guide with excellent structure mapping, detailed request lifecycle trace, strong diagrams, extensive external integration documentation. Missing in-depth testing framework documentation.

without_skill.notes: Solid foundational guide with good directory structure and common task documentation. Lacks diagrams, detailed request lifecycle tracing, comprehensive external dependency documentation, and deeper domain model explanation.
